scripts.build:element-provider: ng build --project=element-provider && rm -rf ./src/assets/element-provider && mkdir -p ./src/assets/element-provider && cp -r ./dist/element-provider/browser/* ./src/assets/element-provider && mv ./src/assets/element-provider/main*js ./src/assets/element-provider/element-provider.js
scripts.build:simple-element-provider: ng build --project=simple-element-provider && rm -rf ./src/assets/simple-element-provider && mkdir -p ./src/assets/simple-element-provider && cp -r ./dist/simple-element-provider/browser/* ./src/assets/simple-element-provider && mv ./src/assets/simple-element-provider/main*js ./src/assets/simple-element-provider/simple-element-provider.js
scripts.build:all: npm run build:ngssm-element && npm run build:element-provider && npm run build:simple-element-provider
